meta.siteDescription: Cost and Management Accountant | Financial Analysis Enthusiast based in Nellore, India. Turning financial data into strategic insights.

hero.name: Uma Bhargavi
hero.title: Cost and Management Accountant  |  Financial Analysis Enthusiast
hero.tagline: Turning Financial Data into Strategic Insights

paragraphs: I am a qualified Cost and Management Accountant (CMA) with strong expertise in financial accounting, cost management, budgeting, and financial analysis. My foundation in management accounting gives me a unique lens to evaluate business performance and identify opportunities for growth.

I am passionate about transforming complex financial data into clear, strategic insights that drive informed decision-making. With a keen interest in finance analytics, macroeconomic research, and AI-powered financial tools, I stay at the forefront of how technology is reshaping the finance profession.
My long-term goal is to contribute to organizations in financial analysis, strategic finance, or consulting roles — helping leadership navigate decisions with confidence and precision.

projects.title: Crude Oil Volatility & Margin Sensitivity Analysis
projects.description: Conducted a comprehensive Q4 FY26 analysis monitoring macro-critical variables and supply chain health following Strait of Hormuz disruptions. Analyzed Brent Crude spot prices ($83.99), USD/INR rate (₹91.63), and India's import cover (42 days) to assess systemic risk. Key findings: a 20% crude spike acts as an indirect tax — every $10/bbl rise widens India's CAD by ~0.5% of GDP. Identified Aviation and Paints as the most vulnerable sectors. Macro outlook rated as Stressed/High Risk.

projects.title: Impact of Strait of Hormuz Closure on Indian Markets
projects.description: Researched and analyzed the cascading financial impact of a potential Strait of Hormuz closure on Indian commodity and equity markets. Studied how disruption to ~20% of global oil supply affects Indian import costs, inflation, currency depreciation, and sector-specific profitability. Assessed impact across energy, aviation, chemicals, paints, and logistics sectors with data-backed insights on price transmission mechanisms in the Indian market.

projects.title: Effective Crude Import Cover Dashboard
projects.description: Designed a professional financial dashboard tracking India's effective crude import cover on a monthly basis. The dashboard presents real-time macro indicators including Brent Crude spot price, USD/INR exchange rate, and import cover in days — providing a single-view snapshot of India's energy security risk. Highlighted critical thresholds and directional changes to support strategic decision-making.

education.institution: Institute of Cost Accountants of India
education.description: Comprehensive qualification covering cost accounting, management accounting, financial management, taxation, and strategic management.
Studying social systems, research methodology, and organisational behaviour — enhancing my ability to understand and communicate within diverse professional environments.
